since_last: 32% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.62%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 32% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.67% · BTC -2.32% · Gold -2.28% · Nasdaq100 -0.51%. 32% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.62%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.62%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.45%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +11.22%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +11.22%, ANET +4.86%, AVGO +4.78%, BIDU +4.71%, AMBA +3.59%. Laggards: UPST -5.54%, CRNC -5.09%, PANW -4.81%, RXRX -4.43%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.03% at $149.51
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.03% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
